description: Assets under construction or installation not yet ready for use. Examples: Buildings under construction, plant and machinery being installed, capital advances for fixed assets.

Amounts recoverable in future periods due to deductible temporary differences, tax losses or credits carried forward. Shown net of deferred tax liabilities where legally enforceable right of offset exists. Examples: Timing differences from depreciation, provision for doubtful debts.
Change in deferred tax assets and liabilities recognised in profit or loss for the period. Examples: Deferred tax charge/credit arising from timing differences between book and tax profit.

Amounts payable in future periods due to taxable temporary differences. Shown net of deferred tax assets where legally enforceable right of offset exists. Examples: Timing differences from accelerated depreciation for tax purposes.

Internally generated intangible assets in the development phase not yet ready for use. Examples: Software under development, internally developed patents, product development costs qualifying for capitalisation.

Non-current receivables in the nature of loans and advances expected to be recovered after twelve months. Examples: Capital advances, security deposits, loans to related parties, advances to subsidiaries.
Consideration received on issue of share warrants pending exercise or conversion. Classified separately in Shareholders' Funds as per Schedule III, Part I of the Companies Act 2013.

Application money received for shares not yet allotted, where the company has a right to allot within a period prescribed by Securities Law or the Companies Act 2013. Shown separately below Shareholders' Funds.
